author: @William_Hada
text: This Laser cutter looks like a very nice, capable, and affordable unit. It looks like a great alternative to the K-40's. However, I just want to give you an update on the newer model K40's on the market now. I paid $358 USD ( 485 UK pounds) with shipping for my K-40 5 months ago. It has a newer digital control pad ( adjustable to 0.1 %) for adjusting laser power instead of a dial potentiometer. I think the control software has been updated and find it great to use. I use a one gallon plastic jug for the water cooling reservoir and it seems to handle the cooling just fine.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: nice one mate - thanks for the update

author: @GoVertical17
text: If you throw it across the room is it moving forward through time and space? :)  It looks bigger on the inside than on the outside....

replies.author: @AtlasReburdened
replies.text: Well technically, due to the effects of relativity if you give it a velocity from your frame of reference, it does undergo some minute degree of relativistic contraction, and though this would be imperceptible at the velocities a human can move it at, it would truly and genuinely appear larger to an observer travelling inside it than it would to you from the outside. So if you simply put it on a turn table so that it's always moving compared to your frame of reference, it would always be bigger inside than outside. At least until the turntable stops.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: if you throw fast enough I would guess yes lol

author: @couchninja2997
text:
Robert I have a question on graphite and graphene! when putting graphene in microwave for a reduction ! how to you know if its fully exfoliated
I'm sure i left in microwave longer then needed lol , a good amount in a cup like half full it seems to insulate heat and i could touch on out side but once i mixed and introduced it to oxygen it got red hot and  instantly looked like translucent lava!? like it encapsulated from outside in was strange awww well..?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: the simple answer is you don't mate -you can only try it and see - after exfoliation sanitation and measurement is about the only way to tell if you were successful or not
